arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano reveals West Ham board stance on sacking Julen Lopetegui today
arts.sum: West Ham United’s board have instructed Julen Lopetegui to deliver immediate change as speculation around a potential sacking swirls, according to Fabrizio Romano. As reported... The post Fabrizio Romano reveals West Ham board stance on sacking Julen Lopetegui today appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Liverpool injury news and return dates for Wolves: Alisson, Elliott latest
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Liverpool's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash with Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: 'The quality they have in reserve': Jamie Carragher blown away by 'back-up' Liverpool player's efforts last night
arts.sum: Liverpool ran out 5-1 winners over West Ham United to cruise into the fourth round of the League Cup on Wednesday night. The Reds didn’t...

arts.ttl: PLAY TEAMSHEET: Can YOU remember the Liverpool team from their epic 5-4 victory against Norwich City in January 2016?
arts.sum: Every day we'll challenge you to name a different starting XI from the Premier League era. We'll give you a team's rough formation, and the number of letters in each player's name. Then it's up to you!

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota new Liverpool fitness plan revealed as point made over Rodri injury
arts.sum: Arne Slot explains the plan for keeping Diogo Jota fit this season after the Liverpool striker's brace in the 5-1 win over West Ham United in the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: Liverpool blamed for Trent Alexander-Arnold uncertainty as Real Madrid theory emerges
arts.sum: Former Liverpool defender Glen Johnson was asked about what winning trophies at Real Madrid could mean for Trent Alexander-Arnold and how Reds fans would react if he left

arts.ttl: Liverpool 5-1 West Ham: Player ratings as Jota and Gakpo see off 10-man Hammers
arts.sum: LM: Cody Gakpo - 9/10 - Rarely gave the ball away and was a helpful outlet for Liverpool as they looked to stretch West Ham's defence. A Jarell Quansah own goal had seen the visitors lead early doors, but the game was turned on its head by Diogo Jota goals either side of half-time.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds among clubs 'given boost' in Joshua Kimmich pursuit
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly among the clubs who have been given a boost in their pursuit to sign Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich.

arts.ttl: Julen Lopetegui leaves Anfield on crutches after injuring his calf in frustration during West Ham's dismal 5-1 defeat against Liverpool in the Carabao Cup
arts.sum: West Ham manager Julen Lopetegui was left needing crutches after injuring his calf while letting off steam in the Anfield dugout during West Ham's 5-1 Carabao Cup thrashing against Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Carabao Cup fourth-round draw in full as Man Utd, Liverpool and Arsenal discover fate
arts.sum: The draw for the fourth round of the Carabao Cup has been completed, with Manchester United, Manchester City and Chelsea among the clubs to learn their fate for the October fixtures
